caption: This video clip presents educational slides for a course titled "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING." Each frame features a blue header with this title and a subheading that reads "Tutorial – 4." At the bottom of the slides, a footer identifies the lecturer as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay," accompanied by an NPTEL logo on the left. The initial frame shows a mostly blank white slide. In the subsequent frames, a bullet point appears stating "Work/unit mass of gas compressed," followed by a mathematical equation: "$\frac{W}{m} = T_1 (s_1 - s_2) - (h_1 - h_2)$". The scene remains static after the text and equation appear, with no people or physical equipment visible, focusing entirely on the presentation of a thermodynamic formula for cryogenic engineering.
